parameters.content:
## SEO — Opportunity Detection
Runs at 9:30 AM Israel time (07:30 UTC), 30 min after sync.

**Detects:**
- Rising pages (impressions +20% in 7 days)
- Near page one (position 5-20, impressions >= 5)
- High impression low CTR (CTR < 2%, impressions >= 20)
- Commercial intent queries

parameters.query:
SELECT
  page_url,
  SUM(impressions) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7) AS impressions_last7,
  SUM(impressions) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14 AND date < CURRENT_DATE - 7) AS impressions_prev7,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_position) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7)::numeric, 1) AS avg_pos_last7
FROM seo_pages_daily
WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
GROUP BY page_url
HAVING
  SUM(impressions) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14 AND date < CURRENT_DATE - 7) > 0
  AND SUM(impressions) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7) >
      SUM(impressions) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14 AND date < CURRENT_DATE - 7) * 1.2
ORDER BY impressions_last7 DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT
  page_url,
  query,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_position)::numeric, 1) AS avg_position,
  SUM(impressions) AS total_impressions,
  SUM(clicks) AS total_clicks,
  ROUND(AVG(ctr)::numeric, 4) AS avg_ctr
FROM seo_queries_daily
WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 28
GROUP BY page_url, query
HAVING
  AVG(avg_position) BETWEEN 5 AND 20
  AND SUM(impressions) >= 5
ORDER BY (SUM(impressions) * (20 - AVG(avg_position))) DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  page_url,
  query,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_position)::numeric, 1) AS avg_position,
  SUM(impressions) AS total_impressions,
  SUM(clicks) AS total_clicks,
  ROUND(AVG(ctr)::numeric, 4) AS avg_ctr
FROM seo_queries_daily
WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 28
GROUP BY page_url, query
HAVING
  AVG(ctr) < 0.02
  AND SUM(impressions) >= 20
ORDER BY SUM(impressions) DESC
LIMIT 100;

=INSERT INTO seo_opportunities (opportunity_type, page_url, query, avg_position, impressions, ctr, priority_score, details, status, detected_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.opportunity_type }}',
  '{{ $json.page_url }}',
  {{ $json.query ? "'" + $json.query.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.avg_position || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.impressions || 0 }},
  {{ $json.ctr || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.priority_score || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.details }}'::jsonb,
  'new',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

parameters.jsCode:
const all = $input.all();
return [{ json: { total_opportunities: all.length } }];
